com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.LibraryHandler

Description
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
 

  • Uses of LibraryHandler in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews

    Constructors in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews with parameters of type LibraryHandler
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AlbumSongCell(LibraryHandler ctx)
    Constructs an AlbumSongCell and builds the fixed-width column layout for track number, title, play count, date, and the menu button.
     
    AlbumViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx, Runnable onBack, Consumer<Artist> onArtistClick)
    Constructs an AlbumViewBuilder.
     
    ArtistViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx, Consumer<Album> onAlbumSelected, LibraryService libraryService)
    Constructs an ArtistViewBuilder.
     
    FavouritesViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx)
    Constructs a FavouritesViewBuilder.
     
    SongHandler(LibraryHandler ctx)
    Constructs a SongHandler.
     
    SongViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx)
    Constructs a read-only SongViewBuilder without an edit dialog.
     
    SongViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx, SongEditDialog editDialog)
    Constructs a SongViewBuilder with edit-dialog support.
